feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: King's Voyage
entry.summary:
Author: buffetofmadness

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,666Chapters: 13/16Kudos: 138

Summary: ***end of series spoiler, but I fix it so it's ok!!Merlin refuses to accept the loss of Arthur Pendragon. After his death, he still brings him to the lake, but with the hope of resurrecting him. After his success, both he and Arthur are weak. With Morgana's servants still fighting and searching for Arthur, Gwen and Merlin agree that it would be safest for Arthur to disappear for a while. Both Arthur and Merlin aren't as strong as they used to be, but they ride off far away together (despite tensions stemming from Merlin's magic) to pass the time and regain their strength in secret.Basically, Arthur's dream of running off and living on a farm with Merlin comes true, but he's still mad and confused about everything for a bit. They'll eventually work all of their shit out :)

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,867Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 21

Summary: "Was there... was there truly a need for you to kiss me, Merlin?" "You were drowning, Arthur. Believe me, kissing a stubborn, ungrateful royal idiot was not on my itinerary today." One is an Ezaki, a prince searching for the Lake of Avalon to tear down the walls between their worlds. The other is a sorcerer, risking everything to seal the sword forever within its hidden waters. Beginning in Constantinople, the heart of the Eastern Roman Empire, and stretching deep into the Sassanid Empire to the ancient city of Gundeshapur—this is a journey set in 540 AD, where real historical events interweave with a high-stakes "Enemies to Lovers" romance. ✾ Long ago, as humans and Ezakis faced mutual destruction, their kings knelt before the sacred sword in the Lake of Avalon. A history written in blood was sealed with peace, and the Khazar Era began. Until Uther Pendragon rose to power and turned that peace to ash. Desperate, humanity turned back to Avalon. The lake's magic raised a colossal, insurmountable wall between the two realms. The magic was never to be broken; the gate, never opened. Yet, on the day the world tore in two, a power was born to change everything—Merlin.

entry.title: Wheels of Albion
entry.summary:
Author: rustystatic

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,048Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Arthur Pendragon has spent his whole life on a skateboard. For him, skating is discipline, control and who he is.By his twenties, he’s already the best skater in the world and impossible to beat.But what happens when someone else enters the game? Merlin Emrys never meant to take skating seriously. For him, skating was freedom first, rules second. But the second he starts winning, the skateboarding world becomes obsessed with him just as quickly as it once became obsessed with Arthur.And just like that, skateboarding’s biggest rivalry is born.Their rivalry is wheels grinding against concrete, sparks flying every time they share a park.Arthur calls Merlin reckless.Merlin calls Arthur predictable.Commentators frame them as control vs chaos, king vs sorcerer. But behind broken skateparks and after-hours sessions, something shifts between them.Trash talk turns quieter. Challenges become dares. Arguments end too close. They’re rivals because the world demands it.But they become something else because neither of them can skate the same without the other

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Action without Attraction
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,821Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 25

Summary: Aroace Merlin and aromantic Gwaine are friends with benefits, using sex for stress relief, physical pleasure and emotional comfort.Arthur is asexual and very in love with Merlin.This seems like a recipe for disaster, but can they make it work?

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,306Chapters: 15/18Kudos: 523

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: Harry Potter and the Prophecy of Albion
entry.summary:
Author: HarmonyOfTheSpheres

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,904Chapters: 2/23Kudos: 87

Summary: Merlin is missing, Voldemort has returned, and somehow, Harry has been chosen as a Triwizard champion despite never putting his name in the Goblet of Fire in the first place. Which would all be bad enough as it is, except for the fact that there’s also something terribly wrong with magic. Now Harry must not only find Merlin and stop Voldemort before he can fully rise to power, but also survive in a tournament where each task is becoming increasingly dangerous and magically unstable. As spells start to go awry and Voldemort becomes more desperate than ever, Harry and Arthur must work together to restore magic to the land—before it’s too late.

entry.title: A Thousands of Years in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: cjorgo98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 53,149Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 208

Summary: Merlin Emrys, 1500 years old, clinical medical examiner, professional hermit, has finally made peace with the fact that Arthur is gone.He has not made peace with this. He has simply gotten very good at pretending. When Detective Inspector Arthur Pennington walks into his morgue on a Tuesday, looking exactly the same and remembering absolutely nothing, Merlin's carefully constructed equilibrium lasts approximately forty seconds. There is also a murder. Possibly magic. Definitely a conspiracy. But mostly, this is about a man who has been in love for fifteen centuries trying to hold it together in a pub while Arthur Pendragon sits pressed against his leg and has no idea. Slow burn. Reincarnation. Heavy on the yearning, light on the sense.

entry.title: The King's Legends
entry.summary:
Author: Carmil01

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,769Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 8

Summary: King's Legends, one of the most successful rock bands in the world, has a problem. Their lead singer has unexpectedly retired to become a full-time father, leaving them just three months to find a replacement before a massive world tour. They find him in the most unlikely of places. Merlin is an instant hit with the band, the fans, and especially the band's manager, Arthur Pendragon. For Arthur, it's love at first sight. For Merlin, it's impossible. A painful past and a closely guarded secret make any future together seem out of reach. As the Legends travel the globe, they find themselves caught up in a scandal, a near-death experience, an obsessive stalker, and a revelation that changes everything they thought they knew. And through it all, Merlin and Arthur are plagued by strange dreams that seem completely random and impossible to explain. By the time the tour reaches its final stop, nothing will be the same again. Including the answer to what those dreams really mean.

entry.title: Courting the Court Sorcerer
entry.summary:
Author: Harmon_A

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,220Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 58

Summary: It had been a year or so now, since the magic ban had been reversed, months since Merlin became Court Sorcerer. And a few more weeks since Merlin's injury.Arthur had finally given Merlin the Court-Sorcerer chambers he was promised, that just happened to be down the hall from the kings own .Arthur would insist this was not on purpose, but everyone had seen them around the castle, holding and kissing each others hands, teasing each other as usual but with the addition of grinning at each other.There had been a shift in their relationship, and it meant they were more protective of each other than usual. If it wasn't terrifying, it would probably be sweet.But of course this is Camelot, not everything can stay perfect for too long. Destiny would never allow it.---------------------------A continuation from the previous fic in this series. (read if you want context for Merlin's injury or their realtionship, but not needed) Merlin and Arthur begin courting, Merlin knows nothing about noble courting rules, Arthur will do anything to protect Merlin.

entry.title: 500 Miles From My Home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_p3ndragon

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,052Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 192

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word traitor. A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,319Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 44

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon's protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon's curse begins to stir - and Uther Pendragon's madness stands as a warning - Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: You should Never have let me Believe
entry.summary:
Author: Heyup_bro

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 53Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: When the round table crew get captured by a vengeful noble while on a hunt, things quickly turn sour with their captors and Merlin is forced to choose between revealing his magic and saving them all. Obviously, that is an incredibly easy question. All that’s left is to try clean up the mess he creates and get them out, while convincing those fearful of magic that he means no harm. Easy, right? THIS IS NOT YET STARTED AND UNFINISHED PLEASE SAVE FOR LATER IF YOU THINK ITS COOL!!This is my first fic so I hope you guys like it!! Based off of Tansyuduri’s fic ‘Return To Me’

entry.summary:
Author: kosmikowboj

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,870Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 88

entry.title: It Only Took Everyone Else Doing the Thinking
entry.summary:
Author: andromaex

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 750Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 45

Summary: Everyone in Camelot knows. Arthur and Merlin, however, are still aggressively committed to not noticing the obvious fact that they are hopelessly in love with each other. So the knights do what any reasonable group of exhausted friends would do: they intervene.

entry.title: Where might someone hear this from?
entry.summary:
Author: WheatReceipt

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,636Chapters: 9/16Kudos: 112

Summary: A formidable creature of mythology destined to kill Arthur, or die trying. So why's it chasing its tail in the middle of Gaius' storeroom?“Cath palug.” Merlin looks up from the stale scraps of bread he’s trying to convince himself he wants to eat, staring blankly back at Gaius. “You what?”
